title: Define misclassification classification taxonomy and evidence contract
description:
## Summary
Define the operator-facing taxonomy and evidence contract for per-item misclassification classification in evaluations.

## Deliverables
- Lock the four required categories: `score_configuration_problem`, `information_gap`, `guideline_gap_requires_sme`, and `mechanical_malfunction`.
- Define what evidence is available at item scope and what cannot be inferred at item scope.
- Define the classifier output contract for one item, including primary category, rationale, confidence, and evidence snippets.
- Explicitly keep feedback contradictions / label inconsistency analysis out of this classifier.
